The '''Kauron asteroid field''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] in the [[Kauron system/Legends|Kauron system]]. One of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] contained a [[Cavrilhu Pirates]]'s [[Cavrilhu's Kauron base|base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]'' {{Mo}} {{Codex}}
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Specter of the Past (abridged audiobook)|''Specter of the Past'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
*[[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|''Vision of the Future'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
